is                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
    x             clob        := null;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    x2            clob        := null;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    l_focus_area  varchar2(60);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
begin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
for c1 in (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
    select r.id release_id,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
           r.release_train||' - '||r.release release,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
           r.release_type,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
           r.release_open_date,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
           r.release_target_date                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
      from sp_release_trains r                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
     where r.id = p_release_id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
) loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    x := '### Release '||c1.release||chr(10)||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
            'type: '||initcap(c1.release_type)||chr(10)||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
            'date range: '||to_char(c1.release_open_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY')||' to '||to_char(c1.release_target_date,'DD-Mon-YYYY')||chr(10)||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
            '#### Features Included'||chr(10);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
    for c2 in (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
        select a.focus_area,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
               p.project,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
               p.project_size,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
               pp.description project_priority,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
               dbms_lob.substr(p.description,400,1) project_desc,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
               dbms_lob.getlength(p.description) desc_length                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
          from sp_projects p,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
               sp_project_priorities pp,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
               sp_initiative_focus_areas a                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
         where p.release_id = c1.release_id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
           and p.archived_yn = 'N'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
           and p.duplicate_of_project_id is null                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
           and p.focus_area_id = a.id (+)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
           and p.priority_id = pp.id (+)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
         order by a.display_sequence nulls last, a.focus_area nulls last, pp.description, p.project                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
    ) loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
        if nvl(c2.focus_area,'~') != nvl(l_focus_area,'~') then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
           if c2.focus_area is not null then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
              x2 := '##### Focus Area: '||c2.focus_area||chr(10);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
           else                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
              x2 := '##### No Focus Area'||chr(10);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
           end if;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
           l_focus_area := c2.focus_area;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
        end if;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
        x2 := x2||'######  '||c2.project||chr(10)||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                        '  Size: '||c2.project_size||chr(10)||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                        case when c2.project_priority is not null                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                             then '  Priority: '||c2.project_priority||chr(10)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                             end ||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                        case when c2.desc_length > 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                             then '  '||c2.project_desc||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                  case when c2.desc_length > 400 then ' ...' end ||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                  chr(10)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                             end;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
        sys.dbms_lob.append(x, x2);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
        x2 := null;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
    end loop;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
end loop;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
p_summary := x;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
exception                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
    when others then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
        sp_util.add_error_log (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
            p_package_name   => 'sp_summary_util',                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
            p_procedure_name => 'summarize_release',                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
            p_error          => sqlerrm,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
            p_arg1_name      => 'p_release_id', p_arg1_val => p_release_id );                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
end summarize_release;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
-- can be run from APEX App UI (not SQL Commands) or from within a job (if session context is set)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
procedure generate_release_summary (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
    p_release_id    in   number,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
    p_error_yn      out  varchar2 )                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
as                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
    l_system_prompt    clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
    l_release_details  clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
    l_id_to_remove     number;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
    l_ai_service       varchar2(60);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
    l_ai_id            number;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
    l_ai_sum           clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
    l_json_values      apex_json.t_values;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
    l_summary          clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
    l_highlights       varchar2(4000);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
begin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
    p_error_yn := 'N';                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    -- add in today's date                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
    l_system_prompt := 'Today is '|| to_char(sysdate,'DD-Mon-YYYY')||chr(10)||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                        sp_util.get_ai_prompt (p_static_id => 'RELEASE_SUMMARY');                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
    summarize_release (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
        p_release_id    => p_release_id,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
        p_summary       => l_release_details);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
    if l_release_details is not null then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
        for c1 in (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
            select id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
              from sp_release_ai_summaries                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
             where release_id = p_release_id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
               and created > sysdate - g_hrs_to_replace/24                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
             order by created desc                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
        ) loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
            l_id_to_remove := c1.id;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
            exit;  -- exit to just get the last one, in case more than one in the delete range                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        end loop;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
        insert into sp_release_ai_summaries                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
            (release_id, prompt_sent, details_sent)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
        values                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
            (p_release_id, l_system_prompt, l_release_details)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        returning id into l_ai_id;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
        commit;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
        l_ai_service := sp_util.get_setting (p_static_id => 'SUMMARY_AI_SERVICE');                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
        if l_ai_service is not null and                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
           apex_application_admin.get_build_option_status (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
               p_application_id    => sp_util.get_setting (p_static_id => 'APP_ID'),                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
               p_build_option_name => 'AI Release Summaries' ) = 'INCLUDE'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
        then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
            -- wrapping to continue if ai error                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
            begin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                l_ai_sum := apex_ai.generate (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                p_prompt            => 'Summarize the following product release: ' || escape_markdown(l_release_details),                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                p_system_prompt     => l_system_prompt,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                p_service_static_id => l_ai_service );                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                -- save data_received, in case the json parse fails                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                update sp_release_ai_summaries                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                   set data_received = l_ai_sum                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                 where id = l_ai_id;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                 commit;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                apex_json.parse(p_values => l_json_values, p_source => l_ai_sum);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                l_summary    := apex_json.get_clob(p_values => l_json_values, p_path => 'summary');                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                -- extract the highlights as a list                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                for c2 in (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                    select highlights.*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                      from dual,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                           json_table (l_ai_sum, '$.highlights[*]'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                       columns (highlight varchar2(1000) path '$')) highlights                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                ) loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                    l_highlights := l_highlights || '<li>' || c2.highlight || '</li>';                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                end loop;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                update sp_release_ai_summaries                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                   set summary = l_summary,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                       highlights = '<ul>'||l_highlights||'</ul>'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                 where id = l_ai_id;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                 commit;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
/*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                -- remove previous summary as it is being replaced (generated within the g_hrs_to_replace window)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                if l_id_to_remove is not null then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                   delete from sp_project_ai_summaries                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                    where id = l_id_to_remove;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                end if;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
*/                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
            exception                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                when others then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                    p_error_yn := 'Y';                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                    sp_util.add_error_log (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                        p_package_name   => 'sp_summary_util',                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                        p_procedure_name => 'generate_release_summary',                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                        p_error          => sqlerrm,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                        p_arg1_name      => 'p_release_id', p_arg1_val => p_release_id,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                        p_arg2_name      => 'l_ai_id',      p_arg2_val => l_ai_id );                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
            end;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
        end if;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
    else                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
        sp_util.add_error_log (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
            p_package_name   => 'sp_summary_util',                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
            p_procedure_name => 'generate_release_summary',                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
            p_error          => 'summarize_release_project returned without summary',                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
            p_arg1_name      => 'p_release_id', p_arg1_val => p_release_id );                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
    end if;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
end generate_release_summary;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
end sp_summary_util;

package sp_value_compare                                                                                 
-- Determine if two values are equal or not regardless of their nullness                                 
--                                                                                                       
-- In Oracle, to handle comparison with NULL values, you need to use the following Oracle operators:     
-- IS NULL     the logical operation = NULL                                                              
-- IS NOT NULL the logical operation != NULL                                                             
--                                                                                                       
-- for use in database triggers for columns that can be null                                             
-- you can ue is_equal to compare two columns regardless of null values                                  
--                                                                                                       
as                                                                                                       
function is_equal (                                                                                      
   p_value1     in varchar2 default null,                                                                
   p_value2     in varchar2 default null                                                                 
   )                                                                                                     
   return boolean;                                                                                       
function is_equal (                                                                                      
   p_value1     in date default null,                                                                    
   p_value2     in date default null                                                                     
   )                                                                                                     
   return boolean;                                                                                       
function is_equal (                                                                                      
   p_value1     in timestamp default null,                                                               
   p_value2     in timestamp default null                                                                
   )                                                                                                     
   return boolean;                                                                                       
function is_equal (                                                                                      
   p_value1     in clob default null,                                                                    
   p_value2     in clob default null                                                                     
   )                                                                                                     
   return boolean;                                                                                       
--function is_equal (                                                                                    
--   p_value1     in blob default null,                                                                  
--   p_value2     in blob default null                                                                   
--   )                                                                                                   
--   return boolean;                                                                                     
function is_equal (                                                                                      
   p_value1     in number default null,                                                                  
   p_value2     in number default null                                                                   
   )                                                                                                     
   return boolean;                                                                                       
end sp_value_compare;

[1mTEXT[m                                                     
________________________________________________________ 
package body sp_value_compare                            
as                                                       
--                                                       
-- string                                                
--                                                       
function is_equal (                                      
   p_value1     in varchar2 default null,                
   p_value2     in varchar2 default null                 
   )                                                     
   return boolean                                        
is                                                       
begin                                                    
   if p_value1 is null then                              
      if p_value2 is null then                           
         return true;                                    
      else                                               
         return false;                                   
      end if;                                            
   elsif p_value2 is null then                           
      return false;                                      
   else                                                  
      if p_value1 = p_value2 then                        
         return true;                                    
      else                                               
         return false;                                   
      end if;                                            
   end if;                                               
end is_equal;                                            
--                                                       
-- date                                                  
--                                                       
function is_equal (                                      
   p_value1     in date default null,                    
   p_value2     in date default null                     
   )                                                     
   return boolean                                        
is                                                       
begin                                                    
   if p_value1 is null then                              
      if p_value2 is null then                           
         return true;                                    
      else                                               
         return false;                                   
      end if;                                            
   elsif p_value2 is null then                           
      return false;                                      
   else                                                  
      if p_value1 = p_value2 then                        
         return true;                                    
      else                                               
         return false;                                   
      end if;                                            
   end if;                                               
end is_equal;                                            
--                                                       
-- date                                                  
--                                                       
function is_equal (                                      
   p_value1     in timestamp default null,               
   p_value2     in timestamp default null                
   )                                                     
   return boolean                                        
is                                                       
begin                                                    
   if p_value1 is null then

         return true;                                    
      else                                               
         return false;                                   
      end if;                                            
   elsif p_value2 is null then                           
      return false;                                      
   else                                                  
      if p_value1 = p_value2 then                        
         return true;                                    
      else                                               
         return false;                                   
      end if;                                            
   end if;                                               
end is_equal;                                            
--                                                       
-- CLOB                                                  
--                                                       
function is_equal (                                      
   p_value1     in clob default null,                    
   p_value2     in clob default null                     
   )                                                     
   return boolean                                        
is                                                       
begin                                                    
   if p_value1 is null then                              
      if p_value2 is null then                           
         return true;                                    
      else                                               
         return false;                                   
      end if;                                            
   elsif p_value2 is null then                           
      return false;                                      
   else                                                  
      if DBMS_LOB.COMPARE(p_value1,p_value2) = 0 then    
         return true;                                    
      else                                               
         return false;                                   
      end if;                                            
   end if;                                               
end is_equal;

end is_equal;                                            
*/

         return false;
